title: Senior Software Engineer - Broadcom India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Broadcom India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Broadcom India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Broadcom India:
Broadcom India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Broadcom India!
